narrative:
Harrison Twp township has 619 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.6 percentage points.
